mapper.sql: id, employee_id, contract_type, contract_start_date, contract_end_date, probation_salary_ratio, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employee_contract WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY contract_start_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE employee_contract SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
